span.p:
SignalProposition ledger
claim text + support state
anchors + semantic signature
duplicate key + evidence fingerprints

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Hard gates
unsupported/stale/contradictory
generated-only + hidden-only
duplicate semantic proposition
proposal restatement

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
InterventionValueFeatures
correctness x positive value
materiality + actionability + novelty
timing + user need + visibility need
minus interruption + redundancy + uncertainty + brand risk

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Conflict graph + subset optimizer
top 12 candidates
max 3 ambient + one Observation + one Proposal
hard cap 4 live blocks, Assist excluded

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Teaser only
one sentence on prompt submit when one strong signal exists

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Odylith Risks / History / Insight
multiple only when distinct, supported, high value
zero duplicate propositions

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
**Odylith Observation**
one short human line
the non-obvious fact that changes the next move

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
**Odylith Proposal**
only when it adds concrete action
one confirmation for the whole bundle

delivery_channel + delivery_status
proof_required + latency + fingerprints

span.p:
Ruled live renderer
repair missing top/bottom rulers
never drop a good signal for ruler absence
Assist remains closeout-owned

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Odylith Chatter + assistant render
friendly + delightful + soulful
simple + clear + accurate + human

span.p:
Hook payloads
systemMessage + additionalContext
structured evidence, not visibility proof

span.p:
Assistant-render fallback
speak exact Markdown when host hides hooks
hard fail-visible while proof is missing

exact fallback smoke

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Adjudication corpus
bootstrap quality state
synthetic cases do not count for calibration
real transcript density gates for publishable=true

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Value/visibility regression harness
Codex + Claude transcript probes
hidden payload is never success
p95 selector latency <= 15 ms

apply this proposal
